articles.title: A Comparative Study of Causal Interventions vs. Attention for Extracting Gene Regulatory Networks from scGPT
articles.summary: Compares causal interventions and attention-based extraction for recovering gene regulatory networks from scGPT representations.

articles.title: A Benchmark Framework for Bridging Perturbation Experiments and Gene Regulatory Network Inference Methods
articles.summary: Defines a benchmark that links perturbation experiments with gene regulatory network inference methods for more grounded evaluation.

articles.title: Evaluation Bias in Gene Regulatory Network Benchmarks: How Candidate Set Design and Mapping Choices Dominate Method Rankings
articles.summary: Analyzes how candidate-set construction and identifier mapping choices can dominate metrics and reverse benchmark rankings.

articles.title: Attention Head Specialization in scGPT: A Multi-Tissue Analysis and Implications for Gene Regulatory Network Inference
articles.summary: Studies multi-tissue attention head specialization in scGPT and implications for extracting biologically meaningful regulatory networks.
